title.ko: 변조 (메이저(masers), 레이저(lasers) H01S; 부호화, 복호화 혹은 부호변환 H03M)
title.en: MODULATION (masers or lasers H01S;coding, decoding or code conversion H03M)

definition.ko: (1) 이 서브클래스는 정현파진동 또는 전자파에 대한 변조, 키잉(keying) 또는 단속만을 다룬다. 변조신호는 임의소망의 파형이라도 좋다 (2) 이 서브클래스에 있어서 변조기로서나 복조기로서도 사용할 수가 있는 회로는 그종류의 변조기를 다루는 서브클래스로 분류한다

title.en: Amplitude modulation (H03C0005000000, H03C0007000000 take precedence)
Details
Means in, or combined with, modulating stage for reducing angle modulation
Modifications of modulator to reduce distortion, e.g. by feedback, and clearly applicable to more than one type of modulator

title.ko: 가변임피던스 소자에 의한 것(H03C 1/28～ H03C 1/34, H03C 1/46～ 1/52, H03C 1/62가 우선)
title.en: by means of variable impedance element (H03C0001280000-H03C0001340000, H03C0001460000-H03C0001520000, H03C0001620000 take precedence)
the element being a current-dependent inductor
the element being a voltage-dependent capacitor
the element being a diode

title.ko: 적어도 3개의 전극이 있는 전자관에 의한 것(H03C 1/28～ H03C 1/34, H03C 1/50, H03C 1/52, H03C 1/62가 우선)
title.en: by means of discharge device having at least three electrodes (H03C0001280000-H03C0001340000, H03C0001500000, H03C0001520000, H03C0001620000 take precedence)
carrier applied to control grid
modulating signal applied to anode
modulating signal applied to same grid
modulating signal applied to different grid
modulating signal applied to cathode
by means of transit-time tube
by means of a magnetron
by deflection of electron beam in discharge tube
by means of light-sensitive element

title.ko: 적어도 3개의 전극이 있는 반도체 소자에 의한 것(H03C 1/34, H03C 1/50, H03C 1/52, H03C 1/62가 우선)
title.en: by means of semiconductor device having at least three electrodes (H03C0001340000, H03C0001500000, H03C0001520000, H03C0001620000 take precedence)
carrier applied to base of a transistor
modulating signal applied to collector
modulating signal applied to base
modulating signal applied to emitter
Modulators with mechanically-driven or acoustically-driven parts
by means of Hall-effect devices

title.ko: 각도변조의 진폭변조에로의 변환에 의한 것(H03C 1/28～ H03C 1/34, H03C 1/46, H03C 1/48이 우선)
title.en: by converting angle modulation to amplitude modulation (H03C0001280000-H03C0001340000, H03C0001460000, H03C0001480000 take precedence)

title.ko: 반송파 또는 한쪽의 측파대가 완전히 또는 부분적으로 억압되는 변조기(H03C 1/28～ H03C 1/34, H03C 1/46, H03C 1/48이 우선)
title.en: Modulators in which carrier or one sideband is wholly or partially suppressed (H03C0001280000-H03C0001340000, H03C0001460000, H03C0001480000 take precedence)
Balanced modulators, e.g. bridge type, ring type or double balanced type
comprising variable two-pole elements only
comprising diodes
with one sideband wholly or partially suppressed

title.ko: 출력에 있어서의 반송파 성분의 진폭이 변조신호의 치에 관계하는 변조기, 예. 변조신호가 존재하지 않을 때에 반송파가 나오지 않는 것(H03C 1/28, H03C 1/34, H03C 1/46, H03C 1/48이 우선)
title.en: Modulators in which amplitude of carrier component in output is dependent upon strength of modulating signal, e.g. no carrier output when no modulating signal is present (H03C0001280000-H03C0001340000, H03C0001460000, H03C0001480000 take precedence)
Angle modulation (H03C0005000000, H03C0007000000 take precedence)
Details
Means in, or combined with, modulating stage for reducing amplitude modulation
Means for changing frequency deviation
Modifications of modulator to linearise modulation, e.g. by feedback, and clearly applicable to more than one type of modulator
Modifications of modulator for regulating the mean frequency

title.ko: 가변 임피턴스에 의한 것 (H03C 3/30～ H03C 3/38 이 우선)
title.en: by means of variable impedance (H03C0003300000-H03C0003380000 take precedence)
by means of a variable reactive element
simulated by circuit comprising active element with at least three electrodes, e.g. reactance-tube circuit
in which the active element simultaneously serves as the active element of an oscillator
the element being a current-dependent inductor
the element being a voltage-dependent capacitor
the element being a semiconductor diode, e.g. varicap diode
by means of a variable resistive element, e.g. tube
comprising two elements controlled in push-pull by modulating signal
using variable impedance driven mechanically or acoustically
by means of transit-time tube
the tube being a magnetron
by deflection of electron beam in discharge tube
by means of light-sensitive element
by converting amplitude modulation to angle modulation
using two signal paths the outputs of which have a predetermined phase difference and at least one output being amplitude-modulated
by means of electromechanical devices (H03C0003280000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 동일한 변조신호에 의해서 진폭변조 및 각도 변조를 동시에 또는 임의로 발생하게 하는 것(H03C 7/00이 우선)
title.en: Amplitude modulation and angle modulation produced simultaneously or at will by the same modulating signal (H03C0007000000 takes precedence)
by means of transit-time tube
the tube being a magnetron
by deflection of electron beam in discharge tube

title.ko: 전자기파의 변조 (광의 변조를 위한 부품 혹은 장치 G02F 1/00)
title.en: Modulating electromagnetic waves (devices or arrangements for the modulation of light G02F0001000000)
in transmission lines, waveguides, cavity resonators or radiation fields of antennas
Polarisation of transmitted wave being modulated
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
